English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Department of Landscape Architecture design problems
Cornell University. Department of Landscape Architecture
Fleming, Bryant.
Montillon, Eugene D.
Lawson, Edward G. (Edward Godfrey), 1884-1968.
Griswold, Ralph E. (Ralph Esty), 1894-1981.
Davis, E. G. (Edward Gorton), 1880-
15-5-1433
1 cubic feet.
2 mapcase folders.
1924-1940. Exchange problems between Cornell and other universities, and landscape problems set by Bryant Fleming and Eugene D. Montillon; survey data and planting plans, 1908-1921; student projects, 1913-1931; student work for the American Academy in Rome by Edward Lawson, R. E. Griswold, and others; files on New York State institutions used as study data, 1898-1933; plans and measured drawings of historic estates by E. Gorton Davis, 1914-1929. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 3043759
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
October 2018
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, October 2018
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Exchange problems between Cornell and other universities, and landscape problems set by Bryant Fleming and Eugene D. Montillon; survey data and planting plans, 1908-1921; student projects, 1913-1931; student work for the American Academy in Rome by Edward Lawson, R. E. Griswold, and others; files on New York State institutions used as study data, 1898-1933; plans and measured drawings of historic estates by E. Gorton Davis, 1914-1929.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Design Problems, Survey Data
Series II. Students' Work
Series III. Student Work of and for the American Academy in Rome
Series IV. New York State Institutions
Series V. E. Gorton Davis and others
Series VI. Measured drawings of Italian villas
Series VII. Other Material
Cite As:
Department of Landscape Architecture Design Problems, #15-5-1433. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Landscape architecture -- Study and teaching. American Academy in Rome
